hero.title: <1>Eliminate duplicate work</1> in your marketing strategy
hero.description: Centralize your clients' knowledge into a reusable Strategic Core. Never explain your business <1>or search through dozens of files</1> again in a new AI chat.
hero.video_trigger: See how to structure your first Core in < 10 minutes.

diagnosis.title: Your marketing strategy <1>deserves infrastructure</1>, not a folder of loose files.
diagnosis.subtitle: Operational Improvisation vs. <1>Guided, Scalable Flow</1>
diagnosis.description: While the traditional model forces you to improvise processes from scratch with every client, the new ecosystem offers a guided, standardized flow.

left.label: The traditional model
left.step1_desc: Client information ends up <1>trapped in scattered files</1> with no structure or connection to the rest of the operation.
left.step2_desc: Feeding messy documents to AI generates <1>contradictory, watered-down responses</1>.
left.step3_desc: Divergent copies that go stale in weeks. <1>Every new project starts from scratch</1>.
left.result: <1>Fragmented information and unsustainable processes</1> that force you to start over with every client.

right.label: The new model
right.step1_desc: Briefings, notes, and frameworks operate in a <1>connected flow with no duplicates</1>.
right.step2_desc: Knowledge is consolidated into a key-point matrix. The system <1>validates cross-document consistency</1> in real time.
right.step3_desc: Supply any channel, format, or prompt with <1>accurate, validated, fluff-free data</1>.
right.result: A <1>single portable source of truth</1> to scale your production with <1>One-Shot</1> quality control.

how_it_works.title: A flow that <1>guides you step by step</1> to build your Strategic Core
how_it_works.subtitle: Each document you add follows an iterative 4-phase cycle to <1>distill your brand knowledge</1> without friction.

cta.title: Turn your immersion meetings into your <1>biggest competitive advantage</1>
cta.subtitle: Use the platform as a <1>live copilot</1> during your consulting sessions. Structure your clients' Core in real time while validating the strategy together.
cta.feature_1: No <1>awkward silences</1> or vague client answers.
cta.feature_2: Interactive methodological frameworks adapted to each industry.
cta.feature_3: Instant export and injection into any AI.
cta.feature_4: Full cost control (BYOK): Connect your <1>own API Key</1> from leading global providers and manage your inference without commissions or markups.

structure.title: 1. Structure
structure.desc: Complete strategic frameworks guided by high-context questions. The system dynamically adapts each template to your industry, business model, and stage.

extract.title: 2. Extract
extract.desc: Our intelligence layer analyzes responses and automatically distills insights and key variables ($keys$). No generic summaries — pure business logic.

validate.title: 3. Validate
validate.desc: The system evaluates cross-document consistency. Review, adjust, or approve strategic blocks before they are permanently consolidated.

integrate.title: 4. Integrate
integrate.desc: Validated insights are indexed into your Core. From this point on, they are ready to be injected with surgical precision into any prompt or execution flow.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Estratario turns strategic thinking into a structured, persistent, and reusable system. AI-powered strategy, but always with your judgment in control.
features.item1_desc: Complete frameworks like Buyer Persona, Value Proposition Canvas, and Empathy Map with AI assistance. The platform automatically selects relevant documents based on your business stage and the initiative you want to execute.
features.item2_desc: Each completed document generates semantic units (insights) that are automatically integrated into your Strategic Core. Never start from scratch again.
features.item3_desc: A single source of strategic truth that is built and refined progressively. All your business knowledge consolidated and reusable in one place.
features.item4_desc: Generate prompts ready to use in ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini. The system builds the structured context and you choose where to execute the final content.
features.item5_desc: The AI generates personalized questions based on your industry and business stage, with suggested responses that you must validate. Co-creation, not black magic.
features.item6_desc: When creating a workspace, the platform identifies your stage (concept, early, growth, scale) and suggests only the documents you actually need.
features.status_desc: The platform is in v0.8.0 stage. Features are operational but constantly evolving. By donating, you get full access for 30 days and help shape the project's direction.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_p1: César Cuitiño, hereinafter «the controller», is responsible for the processing of personal data collected through this application.
privacy.s2_p1: We only collect the data necessary for the application to function:
privacy.s2_auth_desc: name, email, and profile photo provided by the login provider (Google). We use this data exclusively to manage your account and personalize the experience.
privacy.s2_analytics_desc: we use PostHog as an analytics tool to understand how you interact with the application. PostHog collects anonymous information such as pages visited, clicks, session duration, and system events. We do not share this information with third parties.
privacy.s3_p1: Your data is used solely to:
privacy.s3_item3: Improve the application through anonymous usage analysis (PostHog).
privacy.s4_p1: The processing of your data is based on your explicit consent when accepting this policy and on the execution of the application usage contract.
privacy.s5_p1: We retain your data as long as you maintain an active account. If you delete your account, your personal data will be deleted within a maximum of 30 days. Aggregated anonymous usage data may be retained for longer periods for statistical purposes.
privacy.s6_p1: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties, except:
privacy.s6_providers_desc: hosting, authentication (Google), and analytics (PostHog) services. These providers act as data processors and are subject to confidentiality agreements.
privacy.s6_legal_desc: when required by a competent authority.
privacy.s7_p1: You have the right to access, rectify, delete, and port your data, as well as to limit or object to processing. To exercise these rights, contact us at
privacy.s8_p1: We reserve the right to modify this policy at any time. Changes will be notified through the application or by email.
privacy.s9_p1: If you have questions about this privacy policy, you can write to us at

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.subtitle: Platform changes and updates history.
v1_changes: Strategic documents: Buyer Persona, Value Proposition Canvas, Empathy Map and more.
Step-by-step AI-guided flow with personalized questions based on industry and stage.
Automatic insight extraction from each completed document.
Strategic Core: single source of strategic truth consolidated progressively.
Marketing initiatives: prompt generation ready for ChatGPT, Claude and Gemini.
Intelligent document selection based on business stage.
v0.8.0 mode: operational features, constantly evolving.
